summary: You have completed this lesson! You studied how Node.js Developer Troubleshooting Part 2C allocates memory, processes syntax rules, handles errors, and executes in production environments.
mindMap: State -> Declarations -> Stack Frame -> Heap allocation

flashcards.front: What is the primary role of Node.js Developer Troubleshooting Part 2C?
flashcards.back: To manage states, loop checks, or object definitions.

flashcards.front: Is local scope preferred over global scope?
flashcards.back: Yes, to avoid namespace collisions and memory leakage.
